title: Mix It Up on Trail Mix Day!
story: Nuts, dried fruit, chocolate chips, and maybe some cereal all jumbled together in one perfect snack! National Trail Mix Day happens every August 31, and people celebrate by creating their own custom trail mix combinations. Some folks stick to the classic nuts and raisins, while others go wild with marshmallows, pretzels, or even candy pieces. Hikers love it because it's portable energy, but you don't need to hit the trails to enjoy this crunchy, chewy treat!
activity_question: What are some common ingredients people put in trail mix?
activity_choices: Nuts, dried fruit, and chocolate chips
activity_answer: Nuts, dried fruit, and chocolate chips
bonus_fact: Trail mix was originally called "gorp" by hikers and campers!
